targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM findings f JOIN scans s ON s.id = f.scan_id WHERE ('${project:raw}' = '$__all' OR f.project_id::text = '${project:raw}') AND s.config_json->>'scan_subtype' = 'dependency' AND f.severity = 'critical' AND f.status NOT IN ('resolved','accepted','false_positive') AND s.id IN (SELECT DISTINCT ON (project_id, COALESCE(config_json->>'scan_subtype',''), tool_name, COALESCE(REGEXP_REPLACE(config_json->>'target', ':[^:/]+$', ''), '')) id FROM scans WHERE status = 'completed' ORDER BY project_id, COALESCE(config_json->>'scan_subtype',''), tool_name, COALESCE(REGEXP_REPLACE(config_json->>'target', ':[^:/]+$', ''), ''), completed_at DESC NULLS LAST)

SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM findings f JOIN scans s ON s.id = f.scan_id WHERE ('${project:raw}' = '$__all' OR f.project_id::text = '${project:raw}') AND s.config_json->>'scan_subtype' = 'dependency' AND f.severity = 'high' AND f.status NOT IN ('resolved','accepted','false_positive') AND s.id IN (SELECT DISTINCT ON (project_id, COALESCE(config_json->>'scan_subtype',''), tool_name, COALESCE(REGEXP_REPLACE(config_json->>'target', ':[^:/]+$', ''), '')) id FROM scans WHERE status = 'completed' ORDER BY project_id, COALESCE(config_json->>'scan_subtype',''), tool_name, COALESCE(REGEXP_REPLACE(config_json->>'target', ':[^:/]+$', ''), ''), completed_at DESC NULLS LAST)

SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM findings f JOIN scans s ON s.id = f.scan_id WHERE ('${project:raw}' = '$__all' OR f.project_id::text = '${project:raw}') AND s.config_json->>'scan_subtype' = 'dependency' AND f.severity = 'medium' AND f.status NOT IN ('resolved','accepted','false_positive') AND s.id IN (SELECT DISTINCT ON (project_id, COALESCE(config_json->>'scan_subtype',''), tool_name, COALESCE(REGEXP_REPLACE(config_json->>'target', ':[^:/]+$', ''), '')) id FROM scans WHERE status = 'completed' ORDER BY project_id, COALESCE(config_json->>'scan_subtype',''), tool_name, COALESCE(REGEXP_REPLACE(config_json->>'target', ':[^:/]+$', ''), ''), completed_at DESC NULLS LAST)

SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM findings f JOIN scans s ON s.id = f.scan_id WHERE ('${project:raw}' = '$__all' OR f.project_id::text = '${project:raw}') AND s.config_json->>'scan_subtype' = 'dependency' AND f.severity = 'low' AND f.status NOT IN ('resolved','accepted','false_positive') AND s.id IN (SELECT DISTINCT ON (project_id, COALESCE(config_json->>'scan_subtype',''), tool_name, COALESCE(REGEXP_REPLACE(config_json->>'target', ':[^:/]+$', ''), '')) id FROM scans WHERE status = 'completed' ORDER BY project_id, COALESCE(config_json->>'scan_subtype',''), tool_name, COALESCE(REGEXP_REPLACE(config_json->>'target', ':[^:/]+$', ''), ''), completed_at DESC NULLS LAST)

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT f.raw_data->>'PkgName') AS value FROM findings f JOIN scans s ON s.id = f.scan_id WHERE ('${project:raw}' = '$__all' OR f.project_id::text = '${project:raw}') AND s.config_json->>'scan_subtype' = 'dependency' AND (f.raw_data->>'FixedVersion') IS NOT NULL AND (f.raw_data->>'FixedVersion') != '' AND s.id IN (SELECT DISTINCT ON (project_id, COALESCE(config_json->>'scan_subtype',''), tool_name, COALESCE(REGEXP_REPLACE(config_json->>'target', ':[^:/]+$', ''), '')) id FROM scans WHERE status = 'completed' ORDER BY project_id, COALESCE(config_json->>'scan_subtype',''), tool_name, COALESCE(REGEXP_REPLACE(config_json->>'target', ':[^:/]+$', ''), ''), completed_at DESC NULLS LAST)

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT f.raw_data->>'PkgName') AS value FROM findings f JOIN scans s ON s.id = f.scan_id WHERE ('${project:raw}' = '$__all' OR f.project_id::text = '${project:raw}') AND s.config_json->>'scan_subtype' = 'dependency' AND ((f.raw_data->>'FixedVersion') IS NULL OR (f.raw_data->>'FixedVersion') = '') AND s.id IN (SELECT DISTINCT ON (project_id, COALESCE(config_json->>'scan_subtype',''), tool_name, COALESCE(REGEXP_REPLACE(config_json->>'target', ':[^:/]+$', ''), '')) id FROM scans WHERE status = 'completed' ORDER BY project_id, COALESCE(config_json->>'scan_subtype',''), tool_name, COALESCE(REGEXP_REPLACE(config_json->>'target', ':[^:/]+$', ''), ''), completed_at DESC NULLS LAST)

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT s.config_json->>'target') AS value FROM scans s WHERE ('${project:raw}' = '$__all' OR s.project_id::text = '${project:raw}') AND s.config_json->>'scan_subtype' = 'dependency' AND s.status = 'completed' AND s.id IN (SELECT DISTINCT ON (project_id, COALESCE(config_json->>'scan_subtype',''), tool_name, COALESCE(REGEXP_REPLACE(config_json->>'target', ':[^:/]+$', ''), '')) id FROM scans WHERE status = 'completed' ORDER BY project_id, COALESCE(config_json->>'scan_subtype',''), tool_name, COALESCE(REGEXP_REPLACE(config_json->>'target', ':[^:/]+$', ''), ''), completed_at DESC NULLS LAST)

SELECT f.severity AS metric, COUNT(*) AS value FROM findings f JOIN scans s ON s.id = f.scan_id WHERE ('${project:raw}' = '$__all' OR f.project_id::text = '${project:raw}') AND s.config_json->>'scan_subtype' = 'dependency' AND f.status NOT IN ('resolved','accepted','false_positive') AND s.id IN (SELECT DISTINCT ON (project_id, COALESCE(config_json->>'scan_subtype',''), tool_name, COALESCE(REGEXP_REPLACE(config_json->>'target', ':[^:/]+$', ''), '')) id FROM scans WHERE status = 'completed' ORDER BY project_id, COALESCE(config_json->>'scan_subtype',''), tool_name, COALESCE(REGEXP_REPLACE(config_json->>'target', ':[^:/]+$', ''), ''), completed_at DESC NULLS LAST) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY CASE f.severity WHEN 'critical' THEN 1 WHEN 'high' THEN 2 WHEN 'medium' THEN 3 WHEN 'low' THEN 4 ELSE 5 END

SELECT REGEXP_REPLACE(s.config_json->>'target', '.*/', '') AS image, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE f.severity = 'critical') AS critical, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE f.severity = 'high') AS high, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE f.severity = 'medium') AS medium, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE f.severity = 'low') AS low FROM findings f JOIN scans s ON s.id = f.scan_id WHERE ('${project:raw}' = '$__all' OR f.project_id::text = '${project:raw}') AND s.config_json->>'scan_subtype' = 'dependency' AND s.config_json->>'target' IS NOT NULL AND f.status NOT IN ('resolved','accepted','false_positive') AND s.id IN (SELECT DISTINCT ON (project_id, COALESCE(config_json->>'scan_subtype',''), tool_name, COALESCE(REGEXP_REPLACE(config_json->>'target', ':[^:/]+$', ''), '')) id FROM scans WHERE status = 'completed' ORDER BY project_id, COALESCE(config_json->>'scan_subtype',''), tool_name, COALESCE(REGEXP_REPLACE(config_json->>'target', ':[^:/]+$', ''), ''), completed_at DESC NULLS LAST) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 10

list.definition: SELECT name AS __text, id::text AS __value FROM projects ORDER BY name
list.label: Project
list.name: project
list.query: SELECT name AS __text, id::text AS __value FROM projects ORDER BY name
